petrov_stage: Build the first stable pronoun matrix and automate yes/no etiquette lines.
petrov_mission: Greet someone, introduce yourself, and give one short positive or negative statement.

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 我, 你, 他 / 她, 我们.
Listen to a line that uses SVO word order and No case endings on pronouns and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 我, 你, 他 / 她, 我们.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses SVO word order with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Greet someone, introduce yourself, and give one short positive or negative statement.
Repeat the greeting exchange: 你好. 你好吗? 我很好.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 我, 你, 他 / 她, 我们, 你们.
Which particle turns a statement into a yes/no question in this lesson?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 我, 你, 他 / 她.
Produces one correct spoken line using SVO word order.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
